headline: Trump Tariff Defeat Is Market Tailwind ‘No One Is Talking About’
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The sweeping tariffs underpinning President Donald Trump’s economic policy may have gone from a headwind to a tailwind for the stock market, with the Supreme Court’s decision to unwind them setting the stage for a potential earnings boon for some companies.Most Read from BloombergYen Hits Four-Decade Low in Historic Slide That’s Rattled JapanWhatsApp Opens Username Reservations to 3 Billion UsersTrump’s U-Turn on Iran Sanctions Would Unravel Decades of CurbsUS Stocks Get Tech Boos
